description_long: This object consists of two modern bar stools and a matching high table, designed for urban public spaces such as cafes or outdoor plazas. Each stool features a single pedestal base with a circular foot, a curved seat—one upholstered in blue and the other in orange—and a small footrest bar. The table has a rectangular wooden top with a natural finish, supported by three slender, black metal legs. The stools' seats are contoured for comfort and lack backrests, emphasizing a minimalist, industrial aesthetic. The combination of metal, wood, and colored upholstery gives the set a contemporary, inviting appearance suitable for social or casual settings.
description: A set of two pedestal bar stools—one blue, one orange—with a matching high wooden table, all featuring a modern industrial design with metal bases and minimalist lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue stool directly in front of the table, with the orange stool partially visible behind the table.
description_view_1: Side-by-side view of both stools (blue on left, orange on right) flanking the table, clearly displaying the seat shapes and pedestal bases.
description_view_2: Front view with the orange stool in front of the table and the blue stool partially visible behind, highlighting the orange seat's contours.
description_view_3: Side-by-side view with the orange stool on the left and blue stool on the right, both angled outward from the table.
